sections.text:
Deal #11000: $140000, stage closedlost.
Compensation bands for L4/L5/L6 engineers in SF vs NYC vs remote; updated quarterly. Tech screen is 60min: 2 behavioral, 2 technical. Interviewer guide updated 2026-04-01.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11001: $130000, stage qualified.
SBOM generation for the release pipeline needs to include Rust crates, not just Go + npm. Our SSO IdP is Okta, and the metadata URL rotated without notice. All logins failed for 8 minutes.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11002: $158000, stage closedwon.
Audit log retention is set to 30 days but SOC 2 requires 12 months. Need to pipe to S3 Glacier. Error budget dashboard shows we've burned 40% of the monthly budget already; it's the 8th.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11003: $8000, stage presentation.
Stock option plan: 4000 shares reserved for Q2 hires, 2500 remaining after current offers. Audit engagement letter signed with Ernst & Young; fieldwork starts October.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11004: $105000, stage qualified.
Greenhouse ATS integration with Hiveloop for candidate tracking. Tech screen is 60min: 2 behavioral, 2 technical. Interviewer guide updated 2026-04-01.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11005: $23000, stage qualified.
Rate-limit the /auth/otp endpoint to 5 requests per minute per email; currently it's unbounded. Users logged in via SSO are redirected to the wrong org after the SAML assertion is consumed.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11006: $28000, stage closedlost.
DR drill scheduled next week: failover postgres from us-east-1 to us-west-2, expected RTO 10m. Paging policy: Sev1 pages primary, Sev2 Slack-only during business hours, Sev3 ticket only.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11007: $10000, stage closedwon.
Expense reimbursement process: use Brex card for anything under $500, Concur for anything over. HR system doesn't push into Okta automatically; IT has to manually create the account on day 1.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11008: $52000, stage contract.
On-call rotation is 24/7 Tue-Mon with primary and secondary. Swap requests must be 48h in advance. Load test with k6: 2000 concurrent users hit the search endpoint, p99 was 450ms.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11009: $13000, stage qualified.
HR system doesn't push into Okta automatically; IT has to manually create the account on day 1. Week 1 goal: ship a small PR. Week 2: pair with oncall. Week 4: first solo oncall shift.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11010: $85000, stage contract.
Invoice PDF generation times out for customers with > 500 line items — need to paginate. Usage-based metering events are being counted twice on retry when the initial request times out.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11011: $70000, stage decisionmaker.
OIDC discovery URL returns 502 from behind the load balancer; the health check path is wrong. Session cookie SameSite setting needs to change from Lax to Strict before the Firefox 122 rollout.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11012: $29000, stage qualified.
Diversity sourcing: 40% of pipeline from URM channels; measured weekly. Debrief happens within 2 hours. Use the rubric, not vibes. Flag any bias in the feedback.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11013: $170000, stage closedwon.
Refresh token rotation broke after the move to Keycloak 24 — tokens issued before the upgrade are being rejected. Users logged in via SSO are redirected to the wrong org after the SAML assertion is consumed.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11014: $12000, stage presentation.
Pod affinity rule is too strict — we want soft-anti-affinity across zones, currently set to hard. The cluster autoscaler can't scale from zero because the instance group has no node labels.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11015: $133000, stage appointment.
Service accounts need to support client_credentials grant for the new partner integration. Audit log entries for failed MFA challenges are missing the user_agent field.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11016: $174000, stage closedlost.
Vault token TTL is 30d but the auto-renew cron only runs weekly — tokens expire mid-week sometimes. We need row-level encryption for the PII columns; Postgres pgcrypto is the shortest path.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11017: $70000, stage appointment.
Internal transfer policy: must be in-role 18 months unless manager approves a shorter tenure. Greenhouse ATS integration with Hiveloop for candidate tracking.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11018: $151000, stage closedlost.
Vacuum is lagging on the events table — autovacuum thresholds are too conservative. Foreign key cascade on org_memberships is deleting audit entries — the constraint should be RESTRICT.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11019: $173000, stage closedlost.
SLO burn-rate alert is too noisy during weekends. Multi-window multi-burn-rate policy needed. Audit log retention is set to 30 days but SOC 2 requires 12 months. Need to pipe to S3 Glacier.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11020: $120000, stage contract.
Synthetic uptime check is failing because the TLS certificate was renewed but the CA bundle wasn't updated. Prometheus query for p99 latency returns NaN when the service has < 30 requests in the window.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11021: $34000, stage closedlost.
Tailwind's new v4 engine changed how arbitrary values are parsed; our design tokens broke. i18n strings for the admin console are missing Spanish translations for 38 keys.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11022: $74000, stage decisionmaker.
Stripe webhook for customer.subscription.trial_will_end is not being dispatched to our handler. Failed payment retry cadence needs to match Dunning best practices: day 1, 3, 5, 7, then cancel.
sections.title: Deal

GDPR data subject access request: must respond within 30 days. Tooling under internal/privacy/. Contract review SLA: 5 business days for standard, 10 for redlined.

Accessibility audit: 14 color-contrast failures on the dark theme, mostly in secondary text. Storybook stories for the Button component are out of date; the variant prop has 7 values now, stories have 3.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:

Incident: an admin token was committed to a public gist. Rotated, scoped all tokens down. We need row-level encryption for the PII columns; Postgres pgcrypto is the shortest path.

Read replica lag hit 12s during the bulk import; we need to batch the writes smaller. Postgres migration 0042 adds a NOT NULL column without a default; backfill will take 4 hours on prod.

Next.js 15 App Router migration: the /settings page is still using the Pages Router data fetching. Core Web Vitals: LCP is 4.2s on the pricing page because the hero image is eagerly loaded.

Pen test found an IDOR in the /api/users/:id endpoint — we're checking auth but not scope. Our SSO IdP is Okta, and the metadata URL rotated without notice. All logins failed for 8 minutes.

Embedding drift: after the model update, existing chunks no longer match new queries well. Ingest pipeline is losing mini-chunks when a section is exactly at the boundary token count.

Access requests go through Opal; standing access to prod is audited monthly. Expense reimbursement process: use Brex card for anything under $500, Concur for anything over.

JSONB query on the metadata column isn't hitting the GIN index. Query planner picks seq scan. pgBouncer transaction pooling breaks our use of SET LOCAL statement_timeout.

The users_org_idx partial index is not being used by the planner on the member-list query. JSONB query on the metadata column isn't hitting the GIN index. Query planner picks seq scan.

LoRA adapter size for the intent classifier is 40MB; inference on the edge is fine, cold start is not. Red-team findings: 3 prompt-injection patterns that bypass our system prompt. Mitigations in review.

Access requests go through Opal; standing access to prod is audited monthly. The internal wiki has 1400 pages; we should identify the 40 that are critical for a new joiner.

The cluster autoscaler can't scale from zero because the instance group has no node labels. CronJob for nightly ETL is overlapping because concurrencyPolicy was left at the default Allow.

SOC 2 auditor flagged that our secret rotation for AWS IAM keys is quarterly, not monthly. A leaked .env file made it to a contributor's fork on GitHub; the key has been revoked and rotated.

Reindexing from scratch is the only way to change embedding models. Need a zero-downtime migration path. The hybrid_alpha=0.7 default is too vector-heavy for technical content; 0.5 works better in eval.

OpenTelemetry span attribute `http.status_code` is missing from the ingress traces. PagerDuty integration is missing the severity field on alerts coming from Alertmanager.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11224: $179000, stage closedwon.
Error budget dashboard shows we've burned 40% of the monthly budget already; it's the 8th. Log volume doubled this week — Loki ingestion is near quota. Need to audit verbose logs from the new service.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11225: $34000, stage presentation.
WebAuthn passkey enrollment fails on Safari 17 when the user has multiple resident credentials registered. Users logged in via SSO are redirected to the wrong org after the SAML assertion is consumed.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11226: $187000, stage presentation.
Feature flag policy: use flags for any change that could break existing users; remove within 30 days. Product roadmap Q2: RAG ingestion, search API, connector marketplace, rerank controls.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11227: $85000, stage presentation.
The hybrid_alpha=0.7 default is too vector-heavy for technical content; 0.5 works better in eval. Chunk overlap at 20% isn't enough for long-form legal docs; bump to 30% for that tenant.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11228: $189000, stage qualified.
Grafana dashboard for the checkout funnel lost its data source binding after the Grafana 10 upgrade. Audit log retention is set to 30 days but SOC 2 requires 12 months. Need to pipe to S3 Glacier.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11229: $107000, stage presentation.
The 2026-04-17 incident: BGP flap at the edge took us down for 9 minutes. Postmortem draft attached. Load test with k6: 2000 concurrent users hit the search endpoint, p99 was 450ms.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11230: $138000, stage presentation.
Pod affinity rule is too strict — we want soft-anti-affinity across zones, currently set to hard. CronJob for nightly ETL is overlapping because concurrencyPolicy was left at the default Allow.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11231: $5000, stage closedlost.
Referral bonus: $5000 at start, $5000 at 6 months. Doubled for senior and staff hires. Offer letters include equity vest schedule (4y, 1y cliff) and a 2y post-termination exercise window.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11232: $112000, stage closedlost.
Laptop preferences: MBP M-series, 32GB or 64GB RAM depending on role, external keyboard/mouse on request. Expense reimbursement process: use Brex card for anything under $500, Concur for anything over.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11233: $89000, stage presentation.
The hybrid_alpha=0.7 default is too vector-heavy for technical content; 0.5 works better in eval. ACL filter performance degrades at 500k+ chunks per tenant — we need to partition by org.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11234: $194000, stage closedwon.
MMLU scores for our rerank model, measured on CS subset, dropped after the last checkpoint merge. Cost per 1M tokens for text-embedding-3-large is $0.13; fine-tuning Qwen is $0.007 per 1M. 18x cheaper.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11235: $23000, stage appointment.
Load test with k6: 2000 concurrent users hit the search endpoint, p99 was 450ms. DR drill scheduled next week: failover postgres from us-east-1 to us-west-2, expected RTO 10m.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11236: $115000, stage contract.
Contract review SLA: 5 business days for standard, 10 for redlined. Privacy policy needs updating to reflect the new sub-processor for rerank (SiliconFlow).
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11237: $52000, stage qualified.
StatefulSet volume claim template was changed but existing PVCs aren't being updated — they need to be recreated. NetworkPolicy default-deny was applied to the staging namespace and broke the egress to the DB.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11238: $96000, stage qualified.
Master Services Agreement redline with enterprise customer: they want data-residency guarantees in EU. Contract review SLA: 5 business days for standard, 10 for redlined.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11239: $94000, stage closedwon.
Master Services Agreement redline with enterprise customer: they want data-residency guarantees in EU. GDPR data subject access request: must respond within 30 days. Tooling under internal/privacy/.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11240: $63000, stage contract.
Vendor spend analysis: top 5 are AWS, GCP, Stripe, Datadog, Figma. Total $180k/mo. Annual plan for 2026: headcount grows from 45 to 72, OpEx from $8M to $14M.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11241: $106000, stage closedwon.
NetworkPolicy default-deny was applied to the staging namespace and broke the egress to the DB. The cluster autoscaler can't scale from zero because the instance group has no node labels.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11242: $15000, stage decisionmaker.
Alembic downgrade path for migration 0038 is broken — it references a column that was renamed in 0041. Connection pool exhaustion at peak — pgbouncer is set to 100 but we're seeing 120 concurrent connections.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11243: $189000, stage qualified.
SLO burn-rate alert is too noisy during weekends. Multi-window multi-burn-rate policy needed. Grafana dashboard for the checkout funnel lost its data source binding after the Grafana 10 upgrade.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11244: $114000, stage appointment.
Foreign key cascade on org_memberships is deleting audit entries — the constraint should be RESTRICT. Read replica lag hit 12s during the bulk import; we need to batch the writes smaller.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11245: $166000, stage decisionmaker.
ACL filter performance degrades at 500k+ chunks per tenant — we need to partition by org. Embedding drift: after the model update, existing chunks no longer match new queries well.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11246: $48000, stage appointment.
Launch campaign for the search API: blog, Twitter thread, HN launch post, ProductHunt. Ad spend for this quarter: $40k across Google and LinkedIn, measured by signups not clicks.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11247: $120000, stage appointment.
Incident: an admin token was committed to a public gist. Rotated, scoped all tokens down. We need row-level encryption for the PII columns; Postgres pgcrypto is the shortest path.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11248: $82000, stage contract.
Launch campaign for the search API: blog, Twitter thread, HN launch post, ProductHunt. Webinar schedule: 3 per quarter, 45min each, demo + Q&A. Topics lined up through Q3.
sections.title: Deal

sections.text:
Deal #11249: $95000, stage closedwon.
Launch campaign for the search API: blog, Twitter thread, HN launch post, ProductHunt. Webinar schedule: 3 per quarter, 45min each, demo + Q&A. Topics lined up through Q3.
sections.title: Deal
